disabled.selectElectionFirst: Select an election from Election Management first.

boundary.title: A problem occurred while displaying this screen
boundary.description: MiREMS is designed to preserve your work. Retry, go home, or report this error to an administrator.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The requested MiREMS screen does not exist or is outside your authorization scope.

ballot.singleSelectionInstruction: Select exactly one party from the party list.

landing.title: An integrated election management platform for trusted electoral operations
landing.description: MiREMS connects election preparation, candidate and voter administration, voting operations, tabulation, result publication, and audit trails into a unified, standards-aligned workflow.

heroCard.label: Platform operational trust summary
heroCard.title: Auditable election lifecycle
heroCard.description: Role-based access control and event-driven audit trails make critical operational decisions transparent and reviewable.

landing.featuresTitle: Core capabilities that connect the full election operation

workflow.title: End-to-end election workflow
workflow.description: Manage election setup, candidate review, polling place and ballot administration, voting sessions, tabulation, and certification in a unified flow.

audit.title: Auditability and traceability
audit.description: Track operational state changes, approvals, publication actions, and key decisions through audit logs and event records.

architecture.title: Global extension architecture
architecture.description: Support jurisdiction-specific election rules, languages, and UI extensions through modular frontend and service architecture.

landing.advantagesTitle: Secure both operational trust and deployment scalability
landing.advantagesDescription: MiREMS Portal is a business platform designed around standardization, integrity, and accessibility for public election operations.

standardization.title: Operational standardization
standardization.description: Reduce operational variance from preparation to publication with repeatable workflows and role-based screens.

integrity.title: Stronger data integrity
integrity.description: Connect result tabulation and audit trails so data origin and change history remain reviewable.

readiness.title: Deployment readiness
readiness.description: Provide multilingual, themed, accessible, and security-aware portal experiences from the first point of entry.

landing.trustTitle: A portal experience designed for standards and secure operations
landing.trustDescription: MiREMS communicates implementation alignment clearly without overstating formal certification status.

vvsg.title: VVSG 2.0 aligned
vvsg.description: Security, accessibility, and auditability principles reflected in product design

wcag.title: WCAG AA oriented
wcag.description: Accessibility-first UI with high-contrast theme and clear navigation structure

rbac.title: Role-based access
rbac.description: Safe separation of duties across operators, auditors, and system administrators
